name: Schedule
description: Schedule component with day, week, month and year views
searchText: schedule schedule component with day, week, month and year views @mantine/schedule /schedule/schedule candragevent canresizeevent date dayviewprops defaultdate defaultview events labels layout locale mobilemonthviewprops mode monthviewprops onalldayslotclick ondatechange ondayclick oneventclick oneventdragend oneventdragstart oneventdrop oneventresize onexternaleventdrop onslotdragend ontimeslotclick onviewchange radius recurrenceexpansionlimit rendereventbody view weekviewprops withdragslotselect witheventresize witheventsdraganddrop yearviewprops

props.name: canDragEvent
props.description: Function to determine if event can be dragged

props.name: canResizeEvent
props.description: Function to determine if event can be resized

props.name: date
props.description: Current date to display (controlled)

props.name: dayViewProps
props.description: Props specific to DayView (includes startTime, endTime, intervalMinutes, etc.)

props.name: defaultDate
props.description: Default date (uncontrolled)

props.name: defaultView
props.description: Default view level (uncontrolled)

props.name: events
props.description: Events to display across all views

props.name: labels
props.description: Labels override for i18n

props.name: layout
props.description: Layout mode: - 'default' uses same views on all screen sizes - 'responsive' switches to YearView/MobileMonthView on small screens

props.name: locale
props.description: Locale for date formatting (overrides DatesProvider)

props.name: mobileMonthViewProps
props.description: Props specific to MobileMonthView (used in responsive layout)

props.name: mode
props.description: Interaction mode: - 'default' allows all interactions - 'static' disables event interactions

props.name: monthViewProps
props.description: Props specific to MonthView (includes firstDayOfWeek, weekendDays, etc.)

props.name: onAllDaySlotClick
props.description: Called when all-day slot is clicked in DayView/WeekView

props.name: onDateChange
props.description: Called when date changes via navigation

props.name: onDayClick
props.description: Called when day is clicked in MonthView

props.name: onEventClick
props.description: Called when event is clicked in any view

props.name: onEventDragEnd
props.description: Called when any event drag ends

props.name: onEventDragStart
props.description: Called when any event drag starts

props.name: onEventDrop
props.description: Called when event is dropped

type.name: (data: { eventId: string | number; newStart: string; newEnd: string; event: ScheduleEventData; }) => void

props.name: onEventResize
props.description: Called when event is resized

type.name: (data: { eventId: string | number; newStart: string; newEnd: string; event: ScheduleEventData; }) => void

props.name: onExternalEventDrop
props.description: Called when an external item is dropped onto the schedule. Receives the DataTransfer object and the drop target datetime.

props.name: onSlotDragEnd
props.description: Called when a slot range is selected by dragging

props.name: onTimeSlotClick
props.description: Called when time slot is clicked in DayView/WeekView

type.name: (data: { slotStart: string; slotEnd: string; nativeEvent: MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement, MouseEvent>; }) => void

props.name: onViewChange
props.description: Called when view level changes

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: recurrenceExpansionLimit
props.description: Max number of generated recurring instances per recurring series

props.name: renderEventBody
props.description: Custom event body renderer

props.name: view
props.description: Current view level (controlled)

props.name: weekViewProps
props.description: Props specific to WeekView (includes startTime, endTime, intervalMinutes, etc.)

props.name: withDragSlotSelect
props.description: If set, enables drag-to-select slot ranges

props.name: withEventResize
props.description: If true, events can be resized by dragging their edges

props.name: withEventsDragAndDrop
props.description: Enable drag and drop for events

props.name: yearViewProps
props.description: Props specific to YearView (includes firstDayOfWeek, weekendDays, etc.)
